fields.Name: BYO T02 - Contact Form Shows Confirmation
fields.Description: Navigates to the contact form, fills it out with valid data, clicks Submit, and verifies a 'Thanks!' confirmation message appears. Demonstrates the regression suite catching a broken form — the BYO app's Submit handler is a no-op, so this test is expected to FAIL when run against the buggy app.

InputDefinition.goal: Open the page at {{baseUrl}}/contact. Fill out the contact form with: Name='Alex Tester', Email='alex@example.com', Message='Hello, this is a regression test.' Then click the Submit button. After submission, a visible confirmation message containing the word 'Thanks' MUST appear on the page (typically styled in green or as a banner). If no such confirmation message appears within 3 seconds of clicking Submit, the test goal has NOT been met. Report whether you saw a 'Thanks' confirmation.

judgeValidationCriteria: All three form fields (Name, Email, Message) were filled with the requested values
A confirmation message containing 'Thanks' is visible on the page after submission
